description: Calculate the Average Selling Price (ASP) for product sub-categories using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. Create a custom calculation named 'ASP' defined as the sum of revenue divided by the sum of quantity. Visualize the results in a bar chart showing ASP by Product Sub Category, colored by Product Category, and sorted by ASP in descending order. Save the workbook as 'ASP_Analysis' to ~/Documents/ASP_Analysis.dva.
